title: Expandria
description: A modpack that aims to Expand every aspect of Minecraft.
body:
![Expandria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e929c9c94a16a9c339e1b00c0179f3e5a89cc9.png) ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309949ae85b07014b1d1ff48d36642300b361237.png)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e804718f054a29a265433acac303b2fcbe0160.png)

**Expandria** is a modpack that aims to Expand every aspect in the game, from structures and biomes to fishing and other mechanics.
![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309949ae85b07014b1d1ff48d36642300b361237.png) ![Wood Blocks Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f683dfed60ff5a07c7b0e529e647a1b96aca0790.png) ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309949ae85b07014b1d1ff48d36642300b361237.png)

![Main Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b448439b1d2ada41de7a8434b021f29cf0303e3.png)
- **Revamped Fishing:** +60 new fishes around the biomes, caves and dimensions of the game. You can upgrade your fishing rod and add to it props to improve your fishing routines! - **Variants of Workbenches and Other Blocks:** You can make variants of Jukeboxes, Smokers, Lecterns, Bookshelves, Armor Stands, Beds, Composters and more using diverses types of woods and stones. - **Stronger Ender Dragon:** Overhauled Ender Dragon, with new attacks and much more challenging! - **Happy Ghast!:** Backported Happy Ghast to travel with your friends! (Vanilla Backport Mod) - **Enhanced and New Biomes!:** All vanilla biomes has been improved, with better ambiance and generation. Also, you can find two new biomes, the Mulberry Forest and Shrublands. In addition, you can find the Pale Garden! (Backport) - **Overhauled and New Structures!:** The most important structures has been upgraded for a better experience. Also, you can find new structures like The End Castle and new Ruined Portals! - **+100 New discs:** Try collect all of them! - **New Impressive background Music:** New and Beautiful Background Music with a perfect vanilla style to accompany you on your travels around the Biomes and Dimensions! By the talented "Gold Eagle". - **New Paintings:** A lot of new Paintings for decor your house or anything you want. - **More Immersion:** Ambient sounds, particles and effects to improve the atmosphere of the game. - **Mob Variants:** Pigs, Cows, Sheeps, Chickens, Wolves, Zombies, Skeletons and Spiders now have some new variant (Only Skin). - **Snow Pig:** A new type of pig that you can find in snowy biomes. - **Enhanced Snow and Snowy Biomes:** Trees in snow biomes now change their leaves to white when it snows. In addition, snow can now cover blocks such as stairs, fences, and grass. - **The Warden Dimension:** You can now activate the Ancient Cities portal and go to "The Otherside", a sculk-based dimension. - **Much More!**: Discover all the news and changes playing and exploring!
![Footer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/356ba3589979b2229f668a22138eab15582ca9aa.png) ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309949ae85b07014b1d1ff48d36642300b361237.png)
![Future of the Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43ea8a59851c5ddb4c52bd0003335897503e07e7.png)
**We want to update the modpack frequently adding features vanilla-style and expand more aspects of the game. Also of course, we want to translate the modpack and fix any bug or problem.**
